# Merkabit

> A unified theory of physics derived from geometry alone. Selina Stenberg's research derives the Standard Model, gravity, black holes, and all 17 fundamental constants from PSL(2,7) acting on the Eisenstein lattice Z[ω] — zero free parameters across 15 constants. The Merkabit is a balanced ternary computational unit replacing fragile qubits with intrinsically stable dual-spinor geometry. Five hardware predictions confirmed on IBM Eagle r3 quantum processors (2025–2026).

## Research Papers

- [Full Paper Series](https://merkabit.com/papers.html): 34 published papers + base paper on Zenodo. DOI prefix: 10.5281/zenodo.*
- [Capstone — Paper 30 (v2)](https://zenodo.org/records/20117997): The Merkabit Architecture: A Candidate Unified Theory of Physics (v2, May 2026). Complete derivation of Standard Model + gravity + fundamental constants. v2 incorporates matter-antimatter asymmetry as Fifth Face (Papers 35, 36).
- [Paper 4 — Enzymes for Quantum Computing](https://zenodo.org/records/20113876): What quantum computing can learn from enzyme catalysis. Substrate-in / product-out as the boundary operator with opposite sign — the same R/F/T/P-interior-with-S-boundary primitive the merkabit framework identifies.
- [Hardware Validation — Paper 26](https://zenodo.org/records/19554030): Cross-architecture IBM Eagle r3 validation. The Merkabit Is Geometric.
- [Yang-Mills Mass Gap — Paper 16](https://zenodo.org/records/19330363): The Yang-Mills Mass Gap as Spectral Resonance on the Eisenstein Torus.
- [Closure Forces the Clock — Paper 35](https://zenodo.org/records/20126813): Three obstruction modes of B₃₁ loop closure (matter, antimatter, Riemann). Master clock 60 = lcm(h(E₆), h(E₈)); 5-fold ouroboros as the 60 → 12 collapse operator; matter-antimatter rate asymmetry δ_rate = 0.0417 measured on a 6-qubit binary triangle.
- [The Fifth Face of PSL(2,7) — Paper 36](https://zenodo.org/records/20126710): Cosmological baryon-to-photon ratio η_B = 5α⁴/|2T| = 5.91 × 10⁻¹⁰. 3% match to Planck 2018 (6.09 ± 0.06) × 10⁻¹⁰ with zero free parameters. Identifies Paper 35's measured matter-antimatter rate asymmetry with the Yang-Mills mass gap of Papers 9 and 16.
- [Hilbert-Pólya Tunnel — Paper 37](https://zenodo.org/records/20205429): Z₃ × Z₃ iSWAP^J tunnel as the third operator (cross-stratum at Z₆₂) joining Paper 7's binary transfer matrix on B₃₁ and Paper 6's bounded ternary operator on T₇₅. K-modulus theorem rigorous: |K_L(s)| = 1 ⇔ Re(s) = 1/2. Empirical anchors at 35,100 cached zeros and 756 IBM Eagle r3 runs.
- [First Uplift — Paper 38](https://zenodo.org/records/20205440): Axis-genesis at the σ-fixed pivot. σ-fixed-pivot theorem rigorous, machine-precision verified across 10⁴ Haar-random σ-equivariant unitaries on ℂ²⁷. Hardware-validated Z₃ cyclic clock α → γ → β → α on Heron r2 / Eagle r3.
- [Genesis Sequence — Paper 39](https://zenodo.org/records/20205477): Stage-by-stage forced-vs-conjectured audit of the 13-stage build chain (two flows → … → E₆ via McKay). Formalises η_B and Λ as compatible exponential suppressions from the same architectural rigidity.
- [RH Part 1 — Paper 40](https://zenodo.org/records/20205599): Parameter-free empirical resolution of RH at closure-counting level. Five independent observables across 2000 cached Riemann zeros (density < 0.5%, Wigner-GUE, cumulative N(T) exact at T = 100, sub-leading S(T) at Pearson r = 0.974, specific γₙ at < 1% local spacing). Public code at SelinaAliens/Riemanns_resolution.
- [RH Part 2 — Paper 41](https://zenodo.org/records/20205552): Synthesis. K-modulus + σ-fixed-pivot + closure-counting → STT theorem N_arch(T) = N_RvM(T). Selberg trace on Klein quartic X(7) with primes indexing primitive hyperbolic orbits via Z[ζ₇]⁺. Remaining work: four bookkeeping verifications.

## Machine-Readable Knowledge

- [KCP Manifest](https://merkabit.com/knowledge.yaml): Structured knowledge index in Knowledge Context Protocol v0.12. 72 units, 60 relationships. Covers all 35 papers, theory docs, implementation guides, and code. AI agents: parse this manifest and match queries against unit `triggers` and `intent` fields.

## About

- [About Merkabit](https://merkabit.com): Selina Stenberg (founder/CEO, physicist) + Thor Henning Hetland (CTO, ExoCortex builder). Services: Coherence Training, Talks, Workshops, Advisory, Research Rig, Knowledge Infrastructure.

- [llms-full.txt](https://merkabit.com/llms-full.txt): Extended content with paper abstracts, theory descriptions, and implementation details
- [KCP Signing Key](https://merkabit.com/.well-known/kcp-signing-key.pub): ED25519 public key for verifying knowledge.yaml integrity
